welcome.title: Select a Project
welcome.description: Choose a project to browse files, or create a new one.
dashboard.title: Return to the work that matters
dashboard.description: Use this workspace to reopen the latest project, switch context fast, and start a new project without losing momentum.
dashboard.recentProjectFallback: Pick up where you left off and jump back into the same workspace context.
dashboard.noRecentProject: No recent project yet. Create one or pick an existing project to start working.
dashboard.projectsDescription: Switch between active projects or jump back into the last workspace context for any project.
dashboard.noProjects: No projects yet. Add a project to start building your workspace.
dashboard.projectCardFallback: Open this project and continue from files, search, or workflows.
dashboard.quickStartDescription: Use the global page to create a new workspace or manage the projects you already have.
dashboard.workflowDescription: This global page is the front door. Use it to continue recent work, switch projects, and create new ones. Detailed work happens inside each project home.
projectHome.descriptionFallback: This project is ready for focused work across files, search, conversations, and workflows.
projectHome.continueDescription: Jump back into the latest file, tab, conversation, or workflow path for this project.
projectHome.lastFileHint: Open Files to start from the file tree or create the first working document.
projectHome.lastTabHint: Return to the part of the workspace you used most recently.
projectHome.lastSessionHint: Open Files and expand the chat sidebar when you want to start a new conversation.
projectHome.workflowHint: Use guided workflows to organize, rewrite, or produce artifacts for this project.
projectHome.emptyOpenFilesHint: Browse the file tree and start editing the first document for this project.
projectHome.emptySearchHint: Search across project text when you need source material or quick recall.
projectHome.emptyWorkflowHint: Use a guided pipeline when you want structured AI assistance.
projectHome.resourcesDescription: Move into the part of the project workspace that matches the next step in your work.
projectHome.aiActionsDescription: Use these entry points to work with AI inside the context of the current project.
projectHome.aiFilesAction: Open files and collaborate with AI in the editor
projectHome.aiSearchAction: Search project text before drafting or revising
projectHome.aiWorkflowAction: Run a project workflow to generate or transform content
projectHome.currentWorkDescription: Continue the most relevant work item in this project instead of deciding from scratch every time.
projectHome.emptyCurrentWorkDescription: Start with files, search, or a workflow so the project can remember where to bring you back.
projectHome.workspaceStateEmpty: No recent work yet. Open a file, continue a conversation, or run a workflow to build project memory.
projectHome.recentActivityDescription: The project remembers the latest files, conversations, and workflow runs so you can resume the right context quickly.
projectHome.recentSessionsDescription: Continue project-specific AI conversations without hunting through the file workspace first.
projectHome.recentRunsDescription: See the latest structured project runs and reopen the workflow workspace when needed.
management.title: Manage Projects
management.table.name: Name
management.emptyState: No projects found. Click "Add Project" to create one.
management.alert.requiredFields: Please fill in required fields: Name and Root Path
management.confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this project?
workspace.project.emptyDescription: Choose a project to start working, or create a new one to begin.
workspace.project.currentDescription: Project-level entry point for switching, managing, and closing the current workspace.
workspace.project.actionsDescription: Manage the current project here, then continue into Files, Search, or Workflows from the tabs above.
workspace.project.emptyActionsDescriptio: Select a project to unlock project tools like Files, Search, and Workflows.
workspace.project.nextStepHint: Use the tabs above to move into Files, Search, or Workflows once the project is ready.
workspace.project.listDescription: Open a project workspace, switch context, or review available projects.
workspace.search.title: Project Search
workspace.search.description: Search across files in {{projectName}} and jump back into the editor.
workspace.search.emptyState: Enter a keyword to search across the current project.
workspace.workflows.title: Project Workflows
workspace.workflows.description: Choose a workflow and the system will guide the work in {{projectName}} step by step, such as organizing, drafting, or checking content.
workspace.agent.title: Agent
workspace.agent.description: A project-level Agent workspace for {{projectName}}. Combine files, search results, and workflow output here so the Agent can drive multi-file tasks.
workspace.agent.noActiveFile: No active file right now. The Agent can still read other files in the project.
workspace.agent.contextEmpty: No context has been added to Agent yet. Send content here from Files, Search, or Workflows.
workspace.agent.patchHint: File changes appear in tool-call blocks inside the conversation and are only written after explicit confirmation.
workspace.agent.sendFileContextTitle: Send the current file or selection to Agent as context
workspace.agent.sendWorkflowOutputTitle: Send the current workflow output to Agent
workspace.settings.title: Project Settings
workspace.settings.description: Configure project-level behavior for {{projectName}}. This page will hold workspace controls and cleanup actions.
workspace.settings.knowledgeBasesDescrip: Choose which knowledge bases are available to project-scoped Files chat and Agent conversations.
workspace.settings.knowledgeBasesLoadFai: Failed to load knowledge bases for this project.
workspace.settings.knowledgeBasesSaveFai: Failed to save project knowledge base settings.
workspace.settings.knowledgeBasesEmpty: No enabled knowledge bases are available yet.
workspace.settings.knowledgeBaseMode.app: Use project knowledge bases in addition to the assistant's own knowledge bases.
workspace.settings.knowledgeBaseMode.ove: Ignore assistant-bound knowledge bases and only use the ones selected for this project.
workspace.settings.knowledgeBaseSelectio: {{count}} knowledge bases selected for this project
workspace.settings.knowledgeBaseScopeHin: These settings apply to project-scoped Files chat and Agent sessions.
workspace.settings.toolsDescription: Control exactly which tools the model can see in project-scoped Files chat and Agent sessions.
workspace.settings.toolsDefaultHint: New projects default to a minimal tool set so unrelated tools do not distract the model.
workspace.settings.toolsSaveFailed: Failed to save project tool settings.
workspace.settings.toolsScopeHint: These tool switches apply to both Files chat and Agent for this project.
workspace.settings.toolUnavailableKnowle: Unavailable because this project is set to project-only knowledge mode with no selected knowledge bases.
workspace.settings.toolGroups.builtin.de: Small general-purpose helpers that are not tied to project files.
workspace.settings.toolGroups.projectDoc: Read, search, and propose file changes inside this project.
Search and read from the knowledge bases available to this project.
workspace.settings.tools.get_current_tim: Lets the model check the current time in a specific timezone.
workspace.settings.tools.simple_calculat: Lets the model evaluate arithmetic expressions.
workspace.settings.tools.read_project_do: Read any file in the project by path.
workspace.settings.tools.read_current_do: Read the currently active file directly.
workspace.settings.tools.search_project_: Search across project files for matching text snippets.
workspace.settings.tools.apply_diff_proj: Let the model propose a diff preview for any file in the project.
workspace.settings.tools.apply_diff_curr: Let the model propose a diff preview for the active file.
workspace.settings.tools.search_knowledg: Search the knowledge bases available to this project.
Read chunk content returned from knowledge search.
workspace.settings.chatHistoryDescriptio: Remove every project-scoped conversation for this project, including file chat sessions and Agent sessions.
workspace.settings.chatHistoryCountFaile: Failed to load the current conversation count.
workspace.settings.deleteAllConversation: Delete all {{count}} conversations in {{projectName}}? This cannot be undone.
Failed to delete project conversations. Please try again.
fileTree.textSearch.truncated: Showing first matches only. Refine your query for more precise results.
fileTree.modal.deleteFolderWarning: This will permanently delete {{path}} and all contents.
fileTree.modal.deleteFolderConfirmLabel: Type the folder path to confirm
fileTree.error.deleteFolderConfirm: Please type the folder path to confirm.
fileTree.modal.deleteFileConfirmLabel: Type the file name to confirm
fileTree.error.deleteFileConfirm: Please type the file name to confirm.
fileViewer.refreshConfirmDiscard: You have unsaved changes. Refreshing will discard them. Continue?
fileViewer.insertFailed: Failed to insert content into chat. Please try again.
editor.conflictDetected: Save conflict: file changed on disk. Load latest version before saving again.
editor.conflictLatestLoaded: Latest version loaded. You can restore your draft to merge manually.
editor.conflictDraftCopied: Your draft has been copied to clipboard.
editor.conflictDraftCopyFailed: Failed to copy draft to clipboard.
editor.agentSend.autoSaveHelp: Automatically save unsaved editor changes before sending project chat messages.
editor.agentSend.unsavedPromptSave: You have unsaved changes in {{filePath}}. Save first before sending to Agent?
editor.agentSend.unsavedPromptContinue: Continue without saving? Agent will read only the last saved version.
editor.agentSend.autoSaveFailed: Failed to save current file. Message was not sent.
inlineRewrite.title: Inline Rewrite
inlineRewrite.selectTextFirst: Select text in the editor first.
inlineRewrite.noSelectionPromptDescripti: This workflow requires selected text input. Choose how to run.
inlineRewrite.selectionChanged: Selection changed since rewrite generation. Re-run rewrite.
inlineRewrite.selectionMissing: Missing rewrite selection context. Re-run rewrite.
inlineRewrite.createSessionFailed: Failed to create temporary project session for rewrite.
inlineRewrite.invalidNumberInput: Input '{{key}}' must be a valid number.
inlineRewrite.invalidBooleanInput: Input '{{key}}' must be true or false.
inlineRewrite.invalidNodeInput: Input '{{key}}' must be a valid node id.
projectWorkflow.title: Current Workflow
projectWorkflow.emptyHint: Go to Workflows to create or enable a project_pipeline workflow.
projectWorkflow.fileSearchPlaceholder: Search files by name or path
projectWorkflow.invalidNumberInput: Input '{{key}}' must be a valid number.
projectWorkflow.invalidBooleanInput: Input '{{key}}' must be true or false.
projectWorkflow.invalidNodeInput: Input '{{key}}' must be a valid node id.
workflowLauncher.emptyHint: Go to Workflows to create or enable an editor_rewrite workflow.
chat.createFailed: Failed to create new conversation. Please try again.
chat.deleteFailed: Failed to delete conversation. Please try again.
chat.transferFailed: Failed to transfer conversation. Please try again.
directoryPicker.title: Select Server Directory
directoryPicker.instruction: Choose a root folder to browse:
insertButton.insert: Insert selection or file to chat
